item.title: A Christmas Morning Discovery Became America's Biggest Mystery
item.description: Six year old JonBenét Ramsey was reported missing after a ransom note was found inside her family's home. Hours later, a devastating discovery transformed the case into one of the most famous unsolved mysteries in American history, with investigators still searching for answers decades later

media:content.media:title: A Christmas Morning Discovery Became America's Biggest Mystery
media:content.media:description: Six year old JonBenét Ramsey was reported missing after a ransom note was found inside her family's home. Hours later, a devastating discovery transformed the case into one of the most famous unsolved mysteries in American history, with investigators still searching for answers decades later

item.title: A 911 Call Exposed A Killer's Dark Secret
item.description: Shawn Grate's crimes came to light after a woman he was holding captive secretly called 911 while he slept nearby. The call launched an investigation that uncovered multiple killings and brought an end to years of violence.

media:content.media:title: A 911 Call Exposed A Killer's Dark Secret
media:content.media:description: Shawn Grate's crimes came to light after a woman he was holding captive secretly called 911 while he slept nearby. The call launched an investigation that uncovered multiple killings and brought an end to years of violence.

item.title: A Night Of Celebration Turned Into A National Tragedy
item.description: The Itaewon tragedy unfolded during Halloween festivities in Seoul when an overcrowded street became the scene of a devastating crowd crush. The disaster claimed more than 150 lives and sparked widespread scrutiny of crowd management and public safety measures.

media:content.media:title: A Night Of Celebration Turned Into A National Tragedy
media:content.media:description: The Itaewon tragedy unfolded during Halloween festivities in Seoul when an overcrowded street became the scene of a devastating crowd crush. The disaster claimed more than 150 lives and sparked widespread scrutiny of crowd management and public safety measures.

item.title: She Spent Nearly Her Entire Childhood In Isolation
item.description: Genie Wiley was discovered at age 13 after spending most of her life confined and cut off from the outside world. Her case became one of the most significant studies in psychology, raising important questions about language development, human connection, and childhood neglect.

media:content.media:title: She Spent Nearly Her Entire Childhood In Isolation
media:content.media:description: Genie Wiley was discovered at age 13 after spending most of her life confined and cut off from the outside world. Her case became one of the most significant studies in psychology, raising important questions about language development, human connection, and childhood neglect.

item.title: An Entire Family Vanished And One Person Was Missing
item.description: The Dupont de Ligonnès case stunned France after five family members were found dead beneath their home while the father, Xavier Dupont de Ligonnès, disappeared. More than a decade later, he has never been found, making the case one of Europe's most enduring mysteries.

media:content.media:title: An Entire Family Vanished And One Person Was Missing
media:content.media:description: The Dupont de Ligonnès case stunned France after five family members were found dead beneath their home while the father, Xavier Dupont de Ligonnès, disappeared. More than a decade later, he has never been found, making the case one of Europe's most enduring mysteries.

item.title: She Tried To Leave The Relationship But Never Made It Out
item.description: Noor Mukadam's death in Islamabad shocked Pakistan and sparked nationwide conversations about violence against women, privilege, and justice. The high profile case drew intense public attention as investigators pieced together the events leading up to her final hours.

media:content.media:title: She Tried To Leave The Relationship But Never Made It Out
media:content.media:description: Noor Mukadam's death in Islamabad shocked Pakistan and sparked nationwide conversations about violence against women, privilege, and justice. The high profile case drew intense public attention as investigators pieced together the events leading up to her final hours.

item.title: How Could An Eight Year Old Show No Remorse?
item.description: Amarjeet Sada was just eight years old when authorities linked him to the deaths of multiple infants in India. Investigators and psychologists were left searching for answers after reports described his unusually calm demeanor and apparent lack of remorse during questioning.

media:content.media:title: How Could An Eight Year Old Show No Remorse?
media:content.media:description: Amarjeet Sada was just eight years old when authorities linked him to the deaths of multiple infants in India. Investigators and psychologists were left searching for answers after reports described his unusually calm demeanor and apparent lack of remorse during questioning.
